name: collectMemoryGcEvidence
description: Collect medium-cost memory/GC evidence: optional class histogram, thread dump, and/or heap dump (jcmd GC.heap_dump). 中文：按用户选择采集中等成本内存/GC 证据，可包含类直方图、线程栈和/或 heap dump。 Privileged options require a non-blank confirmationToken; heap dump also requires heapDumpOutputPath (absolute .hprof path, existing parent directory, target file must not already exist). Example: {"request":{"pid":12345,"includeClassHistogram":true,"includeThreadDump":false,"includeHeapDump":false,"heapDumpOutputPath":"","confirmationToken":"user-approved"}}

confirmationToken.description: Non-blank caller-provided approval token whenever any privileged include* flag is true.

heapDumpOutputPath.description: Absolute filesystem path for the heap dump file, e.g. C:/tmp/app.hprof; parent directory must exist and target file must not already exist.

includeClassHistogram.description: Run jcmd GC.class_histogram (pause/CPU cost; needs confirmationToken).

includeHeapDump.description: Run jcmd GC.heap_dump to heapDumpOutputPath (needs confirmationToken and an absolute .hprof path that does not already exist).

pid.description: Target JVM process id (decimal); must match a PID from listJavaApps.

request.description: Evidence selection and privileged-field policy; see MemoryGcEvidenceRequest JSON shape.
